item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Upvote because it's the first AWCY scp I've ever read where I didn't want to assign its (in-universe) creator to 106 duty.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
For a first try, this is pretty good, honestly. The story told by the tape is solid. I have a few quibbles, however.

First, the tone isn't off, per se, but the article reads very stilted and unnatural. This could use some cleanup with someone willing to go line by line and help smooth things out.

Second, when I read "cassette tape", I think "audio cassette", not "video cassette". This may just be because I am old, but the tape should be identified either as a video cassette, or specifically as VHS or Betamax.

Lastly, the AWCY connection doesn't make any sense. I mean, even beyond that, the final note adds nothing to this article. The story comes through in the video logs, it doesn't need an explanation or a source or anything. Novote for now, the final addendum is really what's holding me back.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is my first contribution to the site! Thank you to Leveritas for critique!
